    L

    LEFT - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.Directions
     
    Level - Class in levels
    The Level class represents a game level, including its data, enemies, items, and environmental objects.
    Level(BufferedImage) - Constructor for class levels.Level
     
    LEVEL_ATLAS - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    LEVEL_COMP - Static variable in class utilz.LoadSave
     
    LevelCompOverlay - Class in ui
    The LevelCompOverlay class represents the overlay displayed when the player completes a level.
    LevelCompOverlay(Playing) - Constructor for class ui.LevelCompOverlay
     
    LevelCompOverlayTest - Class in ui
     
    LevelCompOverlayTest() - Constructor for class ui.LevelCompOverlayTest
     
    LevelLoadException - Exception Class in exeptions
     
    LevelLoadException(int, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class exeptions.LevelLoadException
     
    LevelManager - Class in levels
    The LevelManager class handles the loading, building, and drawing of levels in the game.
    LevelManager(Game) - Constructor for class levels.LevelManager
     
    levels - package levels
     
    loadEnemies(Level) - Method in class entities.EnemyManager
    Loads enemies from the current level.
    loadLvlData(int[][]) - Method in class components.MovementComponent
    Loads the level data used for collision checks.
    loadLvlData(int[][]) - Method in class components.PhysicsComponent
    Loads the level data.
    loadLvlData(int[][]) - Method in class entities.Player
    Loads level data for physics and movement components.
    loadNextLevel() - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Loads the next level and resets the necessary game state.
    loadNextLevel() - Method in class levels.LevelManager
    Loads the next level in the game, resetting if all levels have been completed.
    loadObjects(Level) - Method in class objects.ObjectManager
    Loads objects from the specified level.
    LoadSave - Class in utilz
    This class is responsible for loading various game resources, such as sprite atlases, level images, and other assets.
    LoadSave() - Constructor for class utilz.LoadSave
     
    lvlIndex - Variable in class levels.LevelManager
